configurations.name: Build and Run ROS2 Mapping

configurations.command: bash -c 'cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch navigation navigation_mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=false'

configurations.name: Run ROS2 Navigation while Mapping and Auto Save Map
configurations.command: bash -c 'cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch navigation navigation_mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=true auto_save_map:=true auto_save_period:=30.0 save_map:="${workspaceFolder}/Other-Files/GeneralData/Maps/live_nav_map"'

configurations.name: Run ROS2 Mapping with Log
configurations.command: bash -c 'cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch map_generator mapping_with_log.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=true log_file:=/home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Other-Files/GeneralData/Logs/mapping_log.txt'

configurations.name: Run ROS2 Localization without RViz
configurations.command: bash -c 'cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/Localization" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch localization localization.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=false'

configurations.name: Run Navigation Wheelchair Sensors
configurations.command: bash -c 'source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && python3 "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/map_generator/arduino_sensor_node_nav.py" --ros-args -p serial_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair -p debug_enabled:=true -p enable_encoder_sanity_filter:=true -p one_wheel_fallback_enabled:=true -p use_imu_yaw:=true'

configurations.name: Run Wheelchair Calibration Collector
configurations.command: bash -c 'mkdir -p "${workspaceFolder}/Other-Files/Tests/Navigation" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && python3 "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation/navigation/wheelchair_calibration_collector.py" --ros-args -p output_directory:="${workspaceFolder}/Other-Files/Tests/Navigation"'

configurations.name: Fit Wheelchair Joystick Calibration
configurations.command: bash -c 'python3 "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation/navigation/fit_joystick_calibration.py" "${workspaceFolder}/Other-Files/Tests/Navigation/wheelchair_calibration_step_summary.csv" "${workspaceFolder}/Other-Files/Tests/Navigation/joystick_calibration.json"'

configurations.name: Run PID CmdVel To Joystick
configurations.command: bash -c 'source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && python3 "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation/navigation/cmd_vel_to_joystick_pid.py" --ros-args -p calibration_file:="${workspaceFolder}/Other-Files/Tests/Navigation/joystick_calibration.json" -p linear_kp:=15.0 -p linear_ki:=1.0 -p linear_kd:=0.0 -p angular_kp:=15.0 -p angular_ki:=1.0 -p angular_kd:=0.0 -p reject_bad_odom:=true'

configurations.name: Run Fake Arduino Serial Data
configurations.command: bash -c 'python3 "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/fake_arduino_serial.py"'

configurations.name: Run Navigation Wheelchair Sensors FAKE
configurations.command: bash -c 'source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && python3 "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/map_generator/arduino_sensor_node_nav.py" --ros-args -p serial_port:=/tmp/ttyFAKE_READER -p baud_rate:=460800 -p startup_skip_lines:=0 -p clear_serial_buffers_on_start:=false -p debug_enabled:=true -p debug_raw_serial:=true -p enable_joystick_serial_output:=false -p enable_encoder_sanity_filter:=true -p one_wheel_fallback_enabled:=true -p use_imu_yaw:=true'
